workflow_title: Testing Text Input and Word Count on Online Notepad
workflow_summary: The user transfers text from a local Notepad application to an online notepad tool, dismisses an interstitial ad, and then tests the online editor's word count and autosave features by clearing the page and manually typing 'test' on multiple lines.

target_element._grounded_selector: openclaw browser find role textbox --name "onlinenotepad.org/notepad" fill ""

steps.narration_context: Navigate to the Online Notepad website.
steps.why_this_action: To use the web-based text editor for note taking or testing.
steps.expected_result: The Online Notepad website loads, potentially showing a full-screen ad (vignette).
steps.possible_failure: Page fails to load or the ad blocks interaction.

target_element.visual_description: Close button on the Google Vignette ad overlay
target_element._grounded_selector: openclaw browser find role button --name "Close" click

steps.narration_context: Dismiss the full-screen advertisement to access the notepad interface.
steps.why_this_action: The ad prevents interaction with the main web application.
steps.expected_result: The ad disappears, revealing the notepad editor.
steps.possible_failure: Clicking the ad might open the advertiser's page instead of closing it.

target_element.visual_description: Main text area of the online notepad

steps.narration_context: Paste the text copied from the local Notepad application.
steps.why_this_action: To transfer draft content to the online tool for editing or storage.
steps.expected_result: Multiple lines containing the word 'test' appear in the editor, and the word count updates to 45.
steps.possible_failure: Clipboard is empty or paste fails due to browser permissions.

target_element.visual_description: Text in the online notepad editor

steps.narration_context: Select all text in the editor.
steps.why_this_action: Preparing to clear the editor to start a new test.
steps.expected_result: All text in the document is highlighted.
steps.possible_failure: Focus is not on the text editor.

steps.why_this_action: To empty the notepad for fresh input.
steps.expected_result: The editor is empty and the word count resets to 0.

target_element._grounded_selector: openclaw browser find role textbox --name "Online Notepad" fill "test"

steps.narration_context: Type the word 'test' repeatedly on multiple lines.
steps.why_this_action: To test the real-time word counter and autosave functionality.
steps.expected_result: The words appear in the document and the word count updates incrementally from 12 to 19.
steps.possible_failure: Network issues might slow down the autosave feedback.

decision_points.how_to_decide: If a grayed-out screen with an ad appears immediately after navigation, look for a 'Close' or 'X' button to reveal the notepad.
